title: Cozy Earthy British Bread Crumb
description: An earthy, flaky dish inspired by traditional British recipes featuring cinnamon and a touch of sweetness that is perfect for breakfast or snack time.
instructions: Place bread crumbs in a mixing bowl.
Add the cinnamon stick and chop it finely into the mixture.
Drizzle coconut oil over the crumb mix, along with brown sugar or honey and vanilla extract.
Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Transfer the mixture to a non-stick pan and cook for about 10 minutes on medium heat.
Once cooked, remove from heat and allow it to cool slightly before serving.
